original_image_tags: Aged, light brown or manila document page with visible foxing and age spots. The top of the page shows two hole-punch circles and a torn edge. The main body of the page contains faint, mostly illegible typed text that appears to be the reverse side of a document showing through, or very faded text. Two official ink stamps are visible at the bottom.

elements.description: Aged document page with hole punches at the top. Faint, mostly illegible typed text is visible across the main body. Two stamped impressions are visible: one reads 'RECEIVED FEB 30 3 55 PM INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE' (upside down), and the other reads 'RECEIVED LIAISON SECTION FEB 31 1 25 PM '47 F.B.I. U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE' (upside down). A handwritten annotation 'Folder 6-3' is visible in the bottom left corner.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific, verbatim text from two ink stamps and a handwritten annotation that Description A describes only as 'mostly illegible' and 'two official ink stamps' without any legible text, creating a direct factual contradiction on the visual content of the images.
